headline: Goldman Sachs quietly resets oil price forecast for 2027
summary: Oil’s war premium just got served a big haymaker on June 12, following reports that U.S. and Iranian officials had agreed on a peace-deal text, according to The Washington Post. Naturally, that raised hopes that the Strait of Hormuz could reopen, a major artery for global oil supplies. ...

headline: Should Goldman’s Neutral Stance Amid Slower Growth Shift How OPCH Investors View Its Home-Infusion Moat?
summary: Earlier in June 2026, Goldman Sachs initiated coverage on Option Care Health with a Neutral rating, highlighting long-term specialty infusion demand alongside near-term earnings uncertainty tied to therapy-specific disruptions in its chronic portfolio. This new coverage arrives after weak first-quarter results, reduced full-year revenue guidance, and a recent downgrade from Bank of America, sharpening investor focus on how slowing growth, tougher insurance approvals, and rising competition...

headline: From 10% chance of success to $2 trillion market cap: SpaceX's historic IPO
summary: After its Nasdaq debut on Friday, SpaceX was the sixth most-valuable U.S. company, despite being a fraction the size by revenue of tech's megacaps.

headline: Why Goldman Sachs (GS) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of global investment bank Goldman Sachs (NYSE:GS) jumped 2.9% in the afternoon session after SpaceX made its market debut (the largest IPO in U.S. history) with Goldman as the lead underwriter.
